'''Advanced Jedi Training Droid 6''' was a [[Training droid/Legends|training droid]] used to referee sparring matches between [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Youngling/Legends|younglings]]. It was in use around [[45 BBY/Legends|45 BBY]]. The Advanced [[Jedi training droid/Legends|Jedi Training Droid]] model had a number of sensors that allowed it to record not only the actions of the two combatants, but also their physiological state, such as body temperature and heart rate.

==Biography==
Advanced [[Jedi training droid/Legends|Jedi Training Droid]] 6 was an undetected observer to the unauthorized [[Lightsaber duel/Legends|duel]] between [[Bruck Chun]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] in the training room. When the senior members of the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] were arguing in the [[Room of a Thousand Fountains/Legends|Room of a Thousand Fountains]] about what to do with Obi-Wan in light of the duel, [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] brought AJTD6 to describe the events that it saw. [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] stopped the [[Training droid/Legends|training droid]] from spending extra time describing minor details about the duel, and the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] told the Council members that Bruck provoked Obi-Wan to fight in order to frame him. AJTD6 would later monitor another duel between the two boys in the battle arena, this time as the referee.<ref name="The Rising Force" />
